message:
🐛 Revert namespace field to native select dropdown (#875)

Revert the input+datalist combo box back to a native <select>
dropdown for the namespace field in the GPU Reservation form.
The datalist style didn't match the rest of the form.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
